title: Kubernetes Security Advisories - 2023-10-25
description:
Merged 3 kubernetes security advisories published on 2023-10-25. Original advisory IDs: CVE-2022-4886, CVE-2023-5044, CVE-2023-5043

Titles:
- ingress-nginx path sanitization can be bypassed
- Code injection via nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/permanent-redirect annotation
- Ingress nginx annotation injection causes arbitrary command execution
affected: kubernetes:<v1.8.0
kubernetes:#### Versions allowing mitigation
kubernetes:v1.8.0
kubernetes:### Mitigation
kubernetes:Ingress objects contain a field called pathType that defines the proxy behavior. It can be Exact, Prefix and ImplementationSpecific.

kubernetes:When pathType is configured as Exact or Prefix, there is more strict validation, allowing only paths starting with "/" and containing only alphanumeric characters and "-", "_" and additional "/".
kubernetes:When this option is enabled, the validation happens in the Admission Webhook, denying creation of any Ingress containing invalid characters (unless pathType is ImplementationSpecific).
kubernetes:https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx/user-guide/nginx-configuration/configmap/#strict-validate-path-type

kubernetes:Ingress Admins should enable this validation by default. If you still need to allow implementation specific paths due to the usage of features like Regex/rewrite on path, we recommend implementing countermeasures to allow just trusted users to consume this feature, as an example with OPA: https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx/examples/openpolicyagent/
kubernetes:### Detection
kubernetes:If you find evidence that this vulnerability has been exploited, please contact [security@kubernetes.io](mailto:security@kubernetes.io)
kubernetes:### Additional Details
kubernetes:See ingress-nginx Issue [#10570](https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/126815) for more details.
kubernetes:### Acknowledgements
kubernetes:This vulnerability was reported by Ginoah, working with the DEVCORE Internship Program.
kubernetes:Thank You,
kubernetes:CJ Cullen on behalf of the Kubernetes Security Response Committee
kubernetes:<v1.9.0
kubernetes:v1.9.0
kubernetes:Ingress Administrators should set the --enable-annotation-validation flag to enforce restrictions on the contents of ingress-nginx annotation fields.
kubernetes:See ingress-nginx Issue [#10572](https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/126817) for more details.
kubernetes:This vulnerability was reported by Jan-Otto Kröpke (Cloudeteer GmbH)
kubernetes:See ingress-nginx Issue[ kubernetes/kubernetes#126816](https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/126816) for more details.
kubernetes:This vulnerability was reported by suanve
